title: Receipt of donations and grants
doc_html:
§1057.  Receipt of donations and grants

The council is authorized to receive donations or grants from private or public sources for the purpose of developing GIS technology and data sets for the state of Louisiana.

Acts 1995, No. 922, §2.
doc_text:
§1057.  Receipt of donations and grants

Acts 1995, No. 922, §2.
